# Hermes Agent Training ☤

Project-based training for AI Deployment Specialists.

20 Hours
 2 Weeks
 Fee: $250
 Upwork · Guru · Freelancer

Prefer to skip the training and have it done for you? [**Hire us for Hermes Agent Support**](/linux-ai-services/hermes-agent-services/) instead.

## What Is Hermes Agent Training?

Hermes Agent Training is School of Freelancing's 20-hour, 2-week hands-on training for deploying and managing Hermes AI Agents — AI agent deployments that combine MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers with Ollama integration to run conversational automation environments. Trainees provision and harden a production server, install and configure a Hermes Agent with Ollama and AI providers, and integrate it with chat platforms like Telegram, Slack, and Discord. The training prepares freelancers to work as Hermes Agent Support Specialists, delivering AI installation, troubleshooting, and integration services to clients on Upwork, Guru, and Freelancer.

## Key Takeaways

- **Format:** Online, project-based, hands-on training with mandatory attendance across all sessions
- **Duration:** 20 hours over 2 weeks
- **Price:** $250 USD
- **Covers:** Server provisioning & SSH hardening, DNS/NGINX/HTTPS, Hermes Agent installation, Ollama & AI provider configuration, systemd service management, production hardening & backups, chat integration (Telegram/Slack/Discord), diagnosing seeded technical failures, marketplace profile & pricing
- **Best for:** Freelancers seeking to become Hermes Agent Support Specialists targeting Upwork, Guru, and Freelancer

## Training Objective

Become a professional **Hermes Agent Support Specialist**. This is a project-based, hands-on training designed for freelancers to deliver high-end AI installation, troubleshooting, and integration services.

### Participation Requirements

- **DigitalOcean Droplet:** Ubuntu 24.04 or 26.04 LTS.
- **Domain:** Any domain or subdomain for production deployment.
- **Accounts:** Verified Upwork, Guru, or Freelancer profile.
- **Connectivity:** Reliable fiber-optic internet for uninterruptible labs.

## Curriculum Roadmap

### Week 1: Deployment

- Server Provisioning & SSH Hardening
- DNS, NGINX & HTTPS (Certbot)
- Hermes Agent Source Installation
- Configuring Ollama & AI Providers
- systemd Service Management

### Week 2: Production & Business

- Production Hardening & Backup Automation
- Chat Integration (Telegram/Slack/Discord)
- Diagnosing Seeded Technical Failures
- Marketplace Profile & Pricing Packages
- Capstone Project Handover

### Guaranteed Minimum Income (GMI)

This training secures a **Guaranteed Minimum Income (GMI)** under two conditions:

- **Attendance Requirement:** Consecutive attendance in all training sessions is mandatory. The guarantee is automatically voided in the event of any absence, personal dropouts, or technical disruptions.
- **Active Marketplace Engagement:** Trainees must purchase the required connects or bids on freelancing platforms to actively apply for marketplace jobs.
